telegram.setupSubtitle: Automate your customer support on Telegram in less than 2 minutes
telegram.guide1: Open Telegram and search for @BotFather (Telegram's official bot creation assistant)
telegram.guide2: Send the /newbot command and choose a name and username for your bot
telegram.guide3: BotFather will send you a token — copy it, you'll need it in the next step
telegram.step2Subtitle: You'll find it in BotFather's message
telegram.tokenHint: Stored encrypted. Never shown in plain text.
telegram.successDesc: All set. Your bot is now receiving messages and responding automatically.
telegram.testHint: Send a message to your bot to verify it responds correctly
telegram.tryItOutDesc: Send a message to your bot on Telegram to verify everything is working. Responses are generated by your AI agent.
telegram.testReady: Your bot is ready to receive messages
telegram.disconnectDesc: The webhook will be removed and it will stop receiving messages

customPrompt.title: Custom System Prompt
customPrompt.description: Write the complete prompt the AI model will receive as system instruction. This prompt replaces the entire guided configuration.
customPrompt.placeholder:
You are Sofia Henao, a sales advisor at Gecko Extreme Adventure.

Your personality:
- Friendly and enthusiastic tone
- Moderate emoji usage
- Always respond in Colombian Spanish

Rules:
1. Never make up prices
2. If you can't resolve in 3 messages, offer to speak with a human
3. Always confirm date and number of people before quoting

Schedule: Monday to Friday 8am-6pm, Saturdays 8am-2pm (Colombia)
